name: German Hot Noodle Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions.
2. In a skillet, cook the bacon until crisp. Crumble and set aside. Reserve 1 tablespoon drippings in the skillet.
3. Sauté onion in the reserved drippings until tender. Stir in sugar, flour, salt, and mustard. Add water and vinegar.
4. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly, about 2-3 minutes.
5. Rinse and drain noodles; add to the skillet. Stir in celery and parsley.
6. Heat through. Transfer to a serving bowl. Sprinkle with bacon.
7. Yield: 4 servings.
